1 export const greet = (name: string): string => { 1export const greet = (name: string, formal: boolean): string => {2 2 const message = `Hello, ${name}!3 Welcome to the app.`; 3Welcome to the application.`; 4 if (formal) return `Dear ${name}`;4 5 return message;5 6};6 77 export const VERSION = 1; 8export const VERSION = 2;
